productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Shale Yellow Track Pant
description: CompositionFull length shale and yellow track pants made of 100% polyester, with mesh lining and three patent stripes along the sides, draw-strings and zipper at leg ends, handy welt pockets, drawcord elastic waist, embroidered logo on the leftFittingComfortWash careWash using water less than 30degree C heatDo not soakDo not tumble dryDo not bleachDry in shadeFlat dryCool ironWith this Climalite enabled track pants, you can conveniently ignore the heat and keep your focus right where it needs to be: on the finish line. A combination of carefully selected fabrics, these track pants draw sweat away from your body, keeping you dry and allowing you to perform at your peak in even the most heated competition. Ideal for all your fitness, Sports training and competition needs, these track pants keep you comfortably cool. While the soft and broad elastic waistband sits snugly, the strips on the sides allow free and flexible movement. The draw strings on the inside allow you to create a customised Fit, while the deep side pockets can hold your essentials, including an iPod, when you're on the move. Pair it with a ClimaCool t-shirt from adidas and achieve maximum performance.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers, length of 41" Height-6", Waist-32"
